title: Build V1 tenant pool manager
description: Manage a pool of 15 V1 tenants (6 active on demo PCs, 6 warming up, 3 buffer). Auto-provision replacement when tenant is claimed. Preserve claimed tenants for 30 days tagged with visitor info. Connect each new tenant to the shared AWS environment. Track pool state. Alert when pool is running low. Research V1 tenant provisioning API or automation path (ask Chris LaFleur for access).
tests: Provision a V1 tenant -> tenant accessible within 30 minutes
Claim a tenant -> pool auto-starts provisioning replacement
All 6 PCs claim simultaneously -> 6 tenants served, 3 buffer remaining
Provisioning failure -> retry triggered, alert sent, pool doesn't crash
Preserved tenant accessible 30 days later with visitor's changes intact
Pool state accurately tracks all 15 tenants (active/warming/buffer/claimed/expired)
